title: Exploration, Strategy & Candidate Selection
description: GEP subsystem that explores the problem space, devises an improvement strategy, and evaluates/selects candidate genes and capsules for execution.

actors.name: GEP Orchestrator
actors.description: Internal automated actor that drives the GEP evolution loop; calls all use cases in sequence.

actors.name: Operator / CI
actors.description: Human or CI process that sets env vars (EVOLVE_STRATEGY, FORCE_INNOVATION, EVOLVE_FORCE_INNOVATION) to steer strategy selection.

actors.name: Memory Graph
actors.description: Supplies memoryAdvice (preferredGeneId, bannedGeneIds, memoryEvidence) to guide selection.

actors.name: Asset Store (JSONL)
actors.description: Persists and reads candidate records (candidates.jsonl, external_candidates.jsonl, failed capsules).

actors.name: Workspace Filesystem
actors.description: Source tree scanned by explore.js for context extraction.

use_cases.name: Explore Workspace
use_cases.description: Scan the project filesystem for source files (.js/.ts/.py/.mjs/.cjs/.jsx/.tsx), excluding noise paths (node_modules, .git/, dist/, build/, *.min.js, *.lock, *.map). Collects workspace context for downstream signal/candidate generation.
key_behaviors: Filter files by extension regex: /\.(js|ts|py|mjs|cjs|jsx|tsx)$/
Exclude paths matching: /node_modules|\.git\/|dist\/|build\/|\.min\.js|package-lock|\.lock$|\.map$/
Async file reading and context assembly

use_cases.name: Resolve Evolution Strategy
use_cases.description: Determine the current improvement strategy (weights for repair/optimize/innovate/explore) from env vars and runtime signals.
use_cases.strategy_fields: repair, optimize, innovate, explore (ratios summing to 1.0), repairLoopThreshold, label, description
key_behaviors: Reads EVOLVE_STRATEGY, FORCE_INNOVATION, EVOLVE_FORCE_INNOVATION env vars
FORCE_INNOVATION=true or EVOLVE_FORCE_INNOVATION=true → 'innovate' strategy
Explicit EVOLVE_STRATEGY takes precedence over FORCE_INNOVATION
Signal 'evolution_saturation' or 'force_steady_state' → 'steady-state' strategy
EVOLVE_STRATEGY='auto' or unknown → falls back to 'balanced' / 'early-stabilize' heuristic
Returns strategy object with .name property

use_cases.name: Expand Signals
use_cases.description: Derive structured learning tags from weak/raw signals to enrich the candidate search space.
key_behaviors: Maps weak signal 'perf_bottleneck' → ['problem:performance', 'action:optimize']
Maps 'stable_success_plateau' → ['problem:stagnation']
Returns enriched tag array for downstream scoring

use_cases.name: Extract Capability Candidates
use_cases.description: Generate improvement candidates from recent session transcript, runtime signals, and recently failed capsules.
key_behaviors: Accepts transcript (string), signals (array), recentFailedCapsules (array)
Creates failure-driven candidates (source='failed_capsules') when capsules repeat failures
Attaches derived tags (via expandSignals) to each candidate
Returns array of candidate objects with {source, tags, ...}

use_cases.name: Evaluate & Score Candidates
use_cases.description: Orchestrate candidate lifecycle: generate new candidates, persist them, read recent/external candidates from store, score against current signals, and return ranked previews.
flow: 2. Persist each new candidate via appendCandidateJsonl(candidate)
4. Partition external candidates: type='Gene' vs type='Capsule'
5. Score each candidate: matchPatternToSignals(pattern, signals) across signals_match/triggers
6. Filter score > 0, sort descending, slice top N

use_cases.name: Match Pattern to Signals
use_cases.description: Score how well a gene/capsule's signal patterns match the current active signals (supports baseName:snippet format).
key_behaviors: Supports exact signal match
Supports baseName:snippet partial match (e.g., 'user_feature_request:add dark mode')
Returns numeric score

use_cases.name: Compute Drift Intensity
use_cases.description: Calculate genetic drift randomness factor based on gene pool size and accumulated memory evidence.
key_behaviors: Base drift: min(1, 1/sqrt(genePoolSize))
When driftEnabled: adds offset (max 0.3) that decays as memoryEvidence grows towards genePoolSize*10
Floor offset at full maturity: ~0.02
When !driftEnabled: returns population-dependent base only

use_cases.name: Select Gene
use_cases.description: Select the best-matching gene from the gene pool based on signal match scores, drift, and memory advice.
key_behaviors: Score each gene via signal match count
Downweight genes with repeated hard-fail anti_patterns
Apply score multiplier for preferredGeneId (memory-guided)
Use drift to allow non-top-scoring gene selection (exploration)
Returns null selected when no signals match
Returns alternatives[] when multiple genes match

use_cases.name: Select Capsule
use_cases.description: Select a previously successful capsule whose triggers match the current signals.
key_behaviors: Matches capsule.trigger[] against active signals
Returns highest-matching capsule or null

use_cases.name: Select Gene and Capsule (Combined)
use_cases.description: Unified selection: runs gene selection and capsule candidate identification together, incorporating memory advice for both.
use_cases.returns: { selectedGene, selector: {selected, reason[], selectionPath}, selectionPath, memoryUsed, memoryEvidence }
key_behaviors: Applies bannedGeneIds and preferredGeneId from memoryAdvice
Emits memoryUsed (boolean) and memoryEvidence (number) telemetry
Combines gene + capsule candidates into unified selector decision

module_dependencies: explore.js → (self-contained: filesystem scan via Node.js fs module)
GEP Orchestrator → explore.js, strategy.js, candidateEval.js, selector.js
data_objects: Gene: { type:'Gene', id, category, signals_match[], strategy[], validation[], anti_patterns?, learning_history? }
Capsule: { type:'Capsule', id, trigger[], gene, summary, confidence, outcome?, blast_radius?, success_streak? }
Strategy: { name, repair, optimize, innovate, explore, repairLoopThreshold, label, description }
Candidate: { source, tags[], type, id, category?, signals_match?, a2a? }
SelectorResult: { selected, alternatives[], driftIntensity, reason[], selectionPath }
key_relationships: GEP Orchestrator initiates all use cases in exploration phase
Operator/CI influences strategy via EVOLVE_STRATEGY, FORCE_INNOVATION env vars
Memory Graph provides preferredGeneId + bannedGeneIds to selectGene / selectGeneAndCapsule
Asset Store is read/written by candidateEval.js (JSONL persistence)
selector.js is used standalone for gene/capsule selection AND as scoring utility in candidateEval.js
important_notes: All source files (explore.js, strategy.js, candidates.js, candidateEval.js, selector.js) are obfuscated single-line bundles. Analysis derived from test files (selector.test.js, candidates.test.js, strategy.test.js), IR function bodies, and the deobfuscated candidateEval.js content visible from the file read. Strategy ratios always sum to ~1.0. Drift uses 1/sqrt(N) formula with adaptive memory-evidence decay.
